question_text:
Strong Password Checker

Design a strong password checker. A password is considered strong if it has length between 6 and 20, at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase, one digit, and no three consecutive repeating characters.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: This is a complex greedy problem. We handle three cases based on length: <6 (inserts/missing types), 6-20 (replaces/missing types), and >20 (deletions and then replaces). We prioritize removals from repeating sequences based on how many deletions it takes to reduce the replacement count. O(N) time.
